testcase.name: test_check_in_changes_status_to_in_progress
testcase.failure: tests/test_session_checkin_checkout_payments.py:93: in test_check_in_changes_status_to_in_progress assert result["status"] == "in_progress", f"Expected in_progress, got {result['status']}" ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ E KeyError: 'status'

testcase.name: test_check_in_records_actual_start_time
testcase.failure: tests/test_session_checkin_checkout_payments.py:98: in test_check_in_records_actual_start_time appointment = self.create_test_appointment() ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ tests/test_session_checkin_checkout_payments.py:74: in create_test_appointment assert response.status_code == 200, f"Failed to create appointment: {response.text}" E AssertionError: Failed to create appointment: {"detail":"Time slot already booked. Please choose a different time."} E assert 400 == 200 E + where 400 = <Response [400]>.status_code

testcase.name: test_therapist_can_record_payment
testcase.failure: tests/test_session_checkin_checkout_payments.py:303: in test_therapist_can_record_payment assert response.status_code == 200, f"Failed to record payment: {response.text}" E AssertionError: Failed to record payment: {"detail":"Access denied - client not assigned to you"} E assert 403 == 200 E + where 403 = <Response [403]>.status_code

testcase.name: test_payment_modes
testcase.failure: tests/test_session_checkin_checkout_payments.py:329: in test_payment_modes assert response.status_code == 200, f"Failed to record {mode} payment: {response.text}" E AssertionError: Failed to record cash payment: {"detail":"Access denied - client not assigned to you"} E assert 403 == 200 E + where 403 = <Response [403]>.status_code

testcase.name: test_payment_statuses
testcase.failure: tests/test_session_checkin_checkout_payments.py:348: in test_payment_statuses assert response.status_code == 200, f"Failed to record {status} payment: {response.text}" E AssertionError: Failed to record paid payment: {"detail":"Access denied - client not assigned to you"} E assert 403 == 200 E + where 403 = <Response [403]>.status_code

testcase.name: test_assistant_can_record_payment
testcase.failure: tests/test_session_checkin_checkout_payments.py:457: in test_assistant_can_record_payment assert response.status_code == 200, f"Assistant failed to record payment: {response.text}" E AssertionError: Assistant failed to record payment: {"detail":"Access denied - client not assigned to you"} E assert 403 == 200 E + where 403 = <Response [403]>.status_code

testcase.name: test_assistant_can_check_in_appointment
testcase.failure: tests/test_session_checkin_checkout_payments.py:504: in test_assistant_can_check_in_appointment assert result["status"] == "in_progress" ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ E KeyError: 'status'

testcase.name: test_assistant_can_check_out_with_payment
testcase.failure: tests/test_session_checkin_checkout_payments.py:556: in test_assistant_can_check_out_with_payment assert result["status"] == "completed" ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ E KeyError: 'status'

testcase.name: test_receipt_contains_all_required_fields
testcase.failure: tests/test_session_checkin_checkout_payments.py:702: in test_receipt_contains_all_required_fields assert payment_response.status_code == 200 E assert 403 == 200 E + where 403 = <Response [403]>.status_code
